artifact: RCA report: inconclusive. I could not execute the east Bohemia UVER-growth decomposition. The planned analysis compares 1996 to 1997 UVER outflow by region, then decomposes regional growth into number of loan-holding accounts or new loans, average loan size, and repayment transaction frequency. No underlying driver is asserted without rows.

sql.region_uver_growth: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS year, d."A3" AS region, SUM(t.amount) AS uver_amount, COUNT(*) AS uver_txn_count, COUNT(DISTINCT t.account_id) AS loan_payment_accounts FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE t.k_symbol='UVER' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) IN (1996,1997) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY region,year;
sql.loan_driver_decomposition: SELECT d."A3" AS region, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(l.date AS DATE)) AS approval_year, COUNT(*) AS new_loans, AVG(l.amount) AS avg_loan_amount, AVG(l.payments) AS avg_payment, AVG(l.duration) AS avg_duration FROM loan l JOIN account a ON a.account_id=l.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(l.date AS DATE)) IN (1996,1997) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY region,approval_year;
sql.payment_frequency: SELECT d."A3" AS region, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS year, COUNT(*)::double precision / COUNT(DISTINCT t.account_id) AS uver_txns_per_account, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_uver_txn_amount FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE t.k_symbol='UVER' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) IN (1996,1997) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY region,year;
